source_authority.rule: Protected GitHub source and its reviewed deployment receipts are authoritative.

recovery_boundary: A clone timestamp or automation marker is never allowed to outrank protected GitHub source. Clone-only work must enter GitHub through a reviewed PR before deployment.

remediation.reason: The final clone retirement pass selected clone-4 by automation last-modified ordering and removed three canonical-only paths.
remediation.action: Trigger the canonical Dockerfile-derived Hugging Face sync from current protected main with pruning and per-file attestation.
remediation.claim: This policy file triggers restoration; deployment and live route verification remain separate evidence gates.
